UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile information stored upon registration.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

email.description: The registered email of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

createdAt.description: The Firestore server timestamp of user registration.

Illustration.title: Illustration
Illustration.description: A single uploaded or created piece of illustration artwork.

id.description: Unique record identifier of the illustration.

description.description: The detailed explanation/inspiration behind the illustration.

imageUrl.description: The preview URL of the illustration artwork.

category.description: Artwork category category (e.g. 奇幻, 角色設計, etc.)

tags.description: User or AI suggested tags descriptive of the illustration.

creatorId.description: UID of the user who made the submission.

creatorName.description: The display name of the creator when published.

creatorAvatar.description: The photo url of the creator when active.

likesCount.description: Total number of likes given to this artwork.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp when it was published.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: An interaction indicator showing a user liked this illustration.

userId.description: UID of the user who liked the post.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A text message posted beneath an illustration.

illustrationId.description: Target ID of the illustration being reviewed.

userId.description: The identity of the comment writer.

/users/{userId}.description: Private and public user profile accounts indexed by their UID.

/illustrations/{illustrationId}.description: The core archive of creative designs shared across users.

/illustrations/{illustrationId}/likes/{u.description: Users who has clicked upvotes for the selected creative design.

/illustrations/{illustrationId}/comments.description: Review board of threads matching creative works.
